title: Apply accepted classification decisions
preconditions: Every selected outcome is an unambiguous suggestion; the evaluation evidence and input fingerprint are current; target transactions are active and eligible; target categories are active; and a replay key identifies the apply request.
postconditions: Successful assignments are attributable in LEDGER; source facts remain unchanged; replay cannot duplicate the decision; each requested transaction has an exact structured outcome.
main_flow: CLASSIFY revalidates the LEDGER contract, snapshot-sensitive state, category, transaction, rule, and evidence versions; submits only public LEDGER category assignment or correction operations; records one structured result per requested transaction; and returns applied, already-applied, rejected, and failed totals.
alt_flows: Reject the entire stale selection before mutation when preview evidence no longer matches current state.
Never apply a conflict or no-suggestion outcome.
Report per-transaction LEDGER rejection for inactive transactions, archived categories, or invalid corrections.
On interruption, replay reports already-applied decisions and safely continues or terminates without duplicate assignments.
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner explicitly selects current suggestions or invokes an approved exact-rule apply after reviewing preview evidence.","status":"draft"}
